arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AppConfig configuration profile.

description.description: A description of the AppConfig configuration profile.

id.description: The ID of the AppConfig configuration profile.

kms_key_identifier.description: The identifier of the AWS KMS key used for encrypting the configuration profile.

location_uri.description: The URI location of the configuration profile.

name.description: The name of the AppConfig configuration profile.

retrieval_role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role used to retrieve the configuration profile.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AppConfig configuration profile.

validator.description: A set of validators for the configuration profile, including content and type.
